reviews.review_msg: Best prof ever for macm 201. He can make you love the material! Fair in testing and reasonable for extra help.
a great prof
Best of all proffesor in Macm 201 cleary know what he is doing never bore you in class .helpful ........take his class if you get chance he is best
Great prof! Funny in lecture.Let people participate in questions in class. Test is combined with easy, medium, and trick questions. Can make you love MACM!

He explains everything clearly with many examples; extremely helpful and always prompt in responding to emails. This course includes various topics and it is a bit overloaded, as a result, you will find Jason often rushed to cover all the materials. Midterms and Final: 40% easy questions 40% medium level questions and 20% relatively hard.

Jason is a very likeable professor. He was able to teach a terrible course like MACM fairly well. Just make sure to show up for every class as he puts no notes online as they are all hand written in class.
The BEST math prof!
quiz and final are well related,both are fair enough,best math pro in SFU.
He is the best prof I have ever met in SFU. Everything you need to do is just read the note and attend the class on time.
Bell is good teacher!
GREAT PROF!
Total babe, I wish he weren't married.

He is very talented and friendly. I found his lectures and assignment very usefull. He teaches you what you have to know for future, he does not waste you time. His exams and midterms are made and marked very fairly. I highly recommend taking him for math 151
GREAT PROFESSOR!!
Great teacher who is really funny. Goes through lectures too fast sometimes though.
Excellent！！
Very good prof. His examples are good and he always explains everything. The tests are easy, I think our second midterm was high B or even low A average. He's pretty funny too.

Nice and funny guy to talk with in class and after. Although exams are not quite easy, it is still achievable to get a good grade just by practising more and comprehence the concepts and the ideas he gives us. Recommended for your exploration in maths!
I love JASON!!
Explains it all perfectly, homework and tests are fair and the workload is good. Funny guy! Makes you want to go to class! Always around for help and very interactive with the students. Great!!

Awesome prof, lots of notes but he is very clear and concise. Makes everything in the course seem easy, very fair midterms and finals, always with one hard question though, likes to make jokes and isnt afraid of looking a little silly,made for an enjoyable lecture and made the class fun.

Excellent prof. Very clear, very interesting.
 
 On top of that, his mannerisms and slight absent-mindedness make for an enjoyable experience during lectures.
 
 Probably the best prof I've had.
Really good prof! Very consistent. I would highly recommend him. Midterms were both very fair, final was pretty hard but not impossible, make sure you study!
Excellent prof!!!!

One of the best proffs I've ever had. very interesting lectures. extremely helpful and clear on materials that I didn't need to go and review the lecture notes. I aced both midterms and I extremely recommand to take courses with him.
by far one of the best math prof i've ever had. his lectures aren't boring his notes are extremely useful. A++++++
Best math prof I've had so far!!!! Funny, explains his points well, observant of the expressions and costumes of the class and acts accordingly.

extremely funny guy, the best prof I ever had~ lot of notes so you don't even need nextbook( except for assignments) . Assignments are easy, midterms are easy, final is a bit trikier. If you gonna take this course, he's definitely the best choice!

I actually wasn't in this class, but sat through some lectures as a refresher because I took this course many semesters ago. This guy seems to really know his material AND is great at conveying this to the class. He has fantastic clarity in his voice and seems to care about his students.

This guy was one of the best profs i have ever had at sfu. He is really really funny and he does a great job keeping you interested. He is very good at teaching this material. If you are taking 232 make sure it is with him!
i love this class!!! extremely insteresting prof =)
Good exciting prof. Sounds snorky. Curriculum change made this course simplified moreso then what jason makes it.
Easy to understand. Good teacher. Gives helpful notes. Fair midterms.

Hilarious. He talks about completely unrelated stuff some times - really funny. Easy to approach. I thought the course was fairly easy until I got a really bad mark in the end. Probably a good idea to actually do the homework assignments.
Good prof.  Very detailed notes and good sense of humor.
Too much notes, at least 4 to 5 pages of notes per class. You'll be busy copying notes rather than listening to his lecture. Exam is a bit hard.
No Comments
Best prof ever. knows what he's doing. organized. reasonable exams.

Great prof, messy but organized lecture notes.  Textbook is so good though that you can get by the course without attending lectures.  His review sessions really helped, the MTs and final were much easier than expected (after hearing comments from previous 232 students).  Makes the lectures interesting, explains material well.

Jason is absolutely the best, extremely helpful, nice,notes are clear, lectures are not boring at all, very humerous prof! mid terms are easy, his proof questions are straight foward, final is a little bit harder, but still very fair! STRONGLY ADVICE YOU TO TAKE HIS 232!

Good prof overall. His notes try to teach you the more abstract concepts as well as gives tons of example of how concepts are applied. Keeps the class light with his arbitrary conversations with audience members about things like cable TV or Michael Jackson. Class can bite you if you lose track of material towards the end.
He is the best professor I have ever had. Very understanding and dedicated to making sure students understand the material. Fair exams, and he's funny.

1st time teaching. Notes generally organized but writes messy and very fast. Difficult to catch up. Most hwk is easy, but all of them have some hard pbm difficult to complete ugh! MTs and Finals NOT that good. Half is easy to do (class/txt material), but other half w/ proofs etc very hard! MATH 232 is challenging and I believe Bell can improve.
Nice Pro. Very organized & helpful notes.

Cable is his kriptonite, mention it and his lecture tumbles into useless dissaray. Drinks way too much coffie, shakes whyle trying to give notes (at mach 2). He will probably spontaniously combust one day trying to covere every single bit of material possible in 50min.

overall, he's a nice prof, a lot of NOTES! but his midterms were okay, except u need to know all the proving and understanding them clearly! but overall, this guy, comparing to nills, is 1000x better.
math 232 is hard, but I believe he is doing well. Should be a lot betta than other profs..
